title: DeathWaypoint
description: Advanced death recovery system with compasses, particles, holograms, and real-time tracking to help players navigate back to their death locations.
body:
# DeathWaypoint - Advanced Death Recovery System

⚠️ **WORK IN PROGRESS - BETA VERSION** ⚠️

This plugin is currently in **active development** and may contain bugs or unstable features. Please test thoroughly before using on a production server!

## 🚧 Beta Warning

**This is an early beta release!** While the core functionality works, you should expect:
- 🐛 **Bugs and glitches** - Some features may not work as intended
- ⚠️ **Potential crashes** - Edge cases haven't all been discovered yet
- 🔧 **Frequent updates** - Features and behavior may change
- 📝 **Missing features** - Some planned features aren't implemented yet

**Please back up your server before installing!**

## 💬 Feedback & Bug Reports

**Found a bug? Have suggestions? Join our Discord!**

We **actively need your feedback** to improve this plugin. Please report any issues, unexpected behavior, or feature requests on our Discord server where the developers are active and responsive.

[🔗 Join Discord Server](#) *(Add your Discord link here)*

Your bug reports and suggestions directly shape the development of this plugin!

---

## 🎯 What Does It Do?

Never lose your items again! **DeathWaypoint** is a feature-rich death recovery plugin that helps players navigate back to their death locations with advanced visual effects, real-time tracking, and intelligent notifications.

When you die, DeathWaypoint saves your death location and provides multiple ways to help you find your way back:
- **Automatic death compass** pointing to your items
- **Stunning particle effects** marking your death location
- **Floating hologram** visible only to you
- **Real-time distance tracking** in your ActionBar
- **Smart despawn warnings** so you never lose items to the timer

## ✨ Key Features

### 🧭 Death Compass System
- Automatically given on respawn
- Points directly to your death location
- Shows detailed info when right-clicked (coordinates, distance, despawn timer)
- Enchanted glint effect for easy identification
- Auto-removed when you arrive

### 🎆 Advanced Visual Effects
- **Soul Pillar** - Vertical column of soul particles
- **Rotating Flame Circle** - Animated flames circling your death point
- **Beacon Beam** - Vertical light beam when you're close (< 30 blocks)
- **Particle Trail** - Guiding particles pointing toward your death (10-40 blocks)
- All particles are player-specific - only you can see them!

### 👻 Hologram Markers
- Floating name tag at your death location
- Shows "☠ [YourName]'s Death"
- Visible only to you
- Automatically removed on arrival

### 📊 Smart Distance Tracking
- Real-time distance display in ActionBar
- Color-coded by proximity:
  - 🟢 **Green** (< 10 blocks) - Almost there!
  - 🟡 **Yellow** (10-50 blocks) - Getting close
  - 🔴 **Red** (> 50 blocks) - Still far away
- Proximity sound effects when near (< 15 blocks)

### ⚠️ Item Despawn Warnings
Items despawn after 5 minutes. DeathWaypoint warns you:
- **1 minute warning** - Yellow message + sound
- **30 second warning** - Red urgent message + high-pitched sound
- **Real-time countdown** shown on compass and in `/deaths` list

### 🎉 Auto-Cleanup on Arrival
When you reach your death location (within 3 blocks):
- ✨ Celebration particles and sounds
- 🎊 Title screen message: "ARRIVED"
- 🧭 Compass automatically removed
- 👻 Hologram disappears
- 🎆 All particles stop
- 📊 ActionBar tracking ends

### 📋 Multi-Death Management
- Store up to **5 deaths** simultaneously
- Switch between different death points
- Each death tracked with timestamp and item count
- View detailed history with `/deaths`

## 🎮 Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/deaths` | List all your death locations with details |
| `/deaths <1-5>` | Set compass to specific death number |
| `/deaths ignore` | Remove current death waypoint (quick cleanup) |
| `/deaths toggle` | Disable/enable all death tracking features |
| `/deaths status` | Check death info (works even when tracking disabled) |
| `/deaths clear` | Remove all death waypoints |
| `/deathtp [number]` | Teleport to death location (requires permission) |

## 🔄 Tracking Toggle System

Don't want death tracking during PvP practice or building? Use `/deaths toggle` to:
- ✅ Disable all compasses, particles, and notifications
- ✅ Still record deaths in the background
- ✅ Check deaths anytime with `/deaths status`
- ✅ Re-enable whenever you want

Perfect for:
- PvP practice sessions
- Creative building
- Testing dangerous mechanics
- Hardcore-style gameplay

## 🔐 Permissions

| Permission | Description | Default |
|-----------|-------------|---------|
| `deathwaypoint.tp` | Teleport to death locations | OP only |
| `deathwaypoint.compass` | Use death compass | Everyone |
| `deathwaypoint.clear` | Clear death waypoints | Everyone |
| `deathwaypoint.*` | All permissions | OP only |

## ⚙️ Configuration

Fully customizable `config.yml` with options for:
- Max deaths stored (default: 5)
- Auto-give compass (default: true)
- Show coordinates on death (default: true)
- ActionBar distance tracking (default: true)
- Particle effects (default: true)
- Particle trail (default: true)
- Death holograms (default: true)
- Despawn warnings (default: true)
- Auto-clear on arrival (default: true)

## 🐛 Known Issues & Limitations

As this is a **work-in-progress beta**, here are some known limitations:
- ⚠️ May have performance issues with many simultaneous deaths
- ⚠️ Cross-dimension tracking has limited functionality
- ⚠️ Some edge cases haven't been fully tested
- ⚠️ Plugin reload may cause issues - restart recommended

**More bugs exist that we haven't discovered yet!** Please report them on Discord.

## 💬 Help Us Improve!

**This plugin needs YOUR feedback to get better!**

We're actively developing and improving DeathWaypoint, and your input is crucial:

- 🐛 **Report bugs** - Even small issues help us improve
- 💡 **Suggest features** - What would make this better?
- 🎮 **Share your experience** - How does it work on your server?
- ⭐ **Test new features** - Try experimental builds
- 📝 **Provide feedback** - What works? What doesn't?

**Join our Discord server to:**
- Report bugs directly to developers
- Get help with configuration
- Suggest new features
- See development updates
- Test beta features early
- Help shape the plugin's future

## 🎯 Use Cases

- **Survival Servers** - Help players recover items after deaths
- **PvP Servers** - Optional tracking for competitive gameplay
- **Adventure Maps** - Guide players back after challenges
- **Hardcore Servers** - Toggle off for true hardcore experience
- **SMP Servers** - Balance between accessibility and challenge

## 💡 Why Choose DeathWaypoint?

- ⚡ **Performance Optimized** - Distance-based rendering, efficient particle systems
- 🎨 **Visually Stunning** - Advanced particle effects and animations
- 🎛️ **Highly Configurable** - Customize every feature
- 🔄 **Flexible Control** - Toggle tracking on/off as needed
- 👥 **Player-Friendly** - Intuitive commands and clear feedback
- 🔒 **Permission-Based** - Control who can teleport
- 📦 **No Dependencies** - Works standalone on Paper/Spigot
- 🚀 **Active Development** - Frequent updates and improvements

## ⚠️ Important Notes

- **This is beta software** - Expect bugs and changes
- **Test before production** - Try on a test server first
- **Restart, don't reload** - Plugin reload may cause issues
- **Keep backups** - Things might break
- **Join Discord** - Stay updated on fixes and improvements
- **Report bugs** - Your feedback makes this plugin better!

---

## 🤝 Community & Support

**This plugin is only as good as your feedback makes it!**

- 💬 **Discord** - Best place for support and bug reports
- 🐛 **Bug Reports** - Help us squash bugs
- 💡 **Feature Requests** - Suggest improvements
- ⭐ **Reviews** - Share your experience (after testing!)

---

**Transform death from frustration to adventure with DeathWaypoint!** 💀✨

*Remember: This is beta software. Please test thoroughly and report issues on Discord!*
